diagrams.title: Cloud Security Shared Responsibility Model
diagrams.description: This diagram illustrates the division of security responsibilities between cloud service providers and customers across different service models (IaaS, PaaS, SaaS). It helps learners understand what each party is responsible for securing.
diagrams.purpose: Explains the fundamental concept of shared responsibility in cloud security, clarifying that security is a joint effort between provider and customer depending on the service model used.

diagrams.title: Cloud Security Layers and SecaaS Components
diagrams.description: This diagram depicts the multiple security layers in cloud computing and the Security as a Service (SecaaS) categories that organizations can leverage for comprehensive protection.
elements: SecaaS Categories: CASB, IAM, DLP, SIEM, Email Security, Web Security, Vulnerability Management
diagrams.purpose: Visualizes the defense-in-depth approach in cloud security and introduces the various SecaaS components that form a comprehensive cloud security strategy.

diagrams.title: Cloud Deployment Models Security Comparison
diagrams.description: This diagram compares security considerations across cloud deployment models (Public, Private, Hybrid, Community), highlighting the trade-offs in control, scalability, and security responsibility.
diagrams.purpose: Helps understand how different deployment models impact security posture, compliance requirements, and organizational control, enabling informed decision-making about cloud strategy.
